tasks.name: write-hvac-juiz
tasks.description: Write scripts/hvac-rag/hvac-juiz.py — pre-flight judge agent: domain validation (HVAC_COMPONENTS, ERROR_CODES, MODEL_PATTERNS), out-of-domain blocking, ASK_CLARIFICATION detection for incomplete models, safety keyword flagging. Output: APPROVED | BLOCKED | ASK_CLARIFICATION + reason. Latency target: <50ms
tasks.acceptance: juiz.py exits 0 on valid HVAC query, exits 1 on out-of-domain, exits 2 on ASK_CLARIFICATION

tasks.name: write-hvac-field-tutor
tasks.description: Write scripts/hvac-rag/hvac-field-tutor.py — enhanced context retriever: top_k=10, procedural expansion for safety topics (IPM, alta tensão, lockout/tagout), diagnostic flowcharts from error_code chunks. Integrates with existing Qdrant search.
tasks.acceptance: field-tutor.py returns enhanced context with procedural steps for safety queries

tasks.name: write-hvac-formatter
tasks.description: Write scripts/hvac-rag/hvac-formatter.py — printable output formatter: strip markdown to plain text, format for 58mm thermal printer width, safety boxes with ASCII art, numbered procedures, model/error code highlighting. Include QR code generation for digital link.
tasks.acceptance: formatter.py produces clean plain text output valid for thermal printer

tasks.name: integrate-juiz-into-pipe
tasks.description: Update scripts/hvac-rag/hvac-rag-pipe.py — integrate Juiz pre-flight check before Qdrant search. Juiz result controls: BLOCKED (return block message), ASK_CLARIFICATION (return ask message), APPROVED (continue to Qdrant). Add Juiz result to logs.
tasks.acceptance: Pipe correctly blocks out-of-domain, asks clarification for incomplete models, approves valid HVAC queries

tasks.name: add-printable-endpoint
tasks.description: Add POST /v1/chat/completions/printable endpoint to hvac-rag-pipe.py — accepts same payload as /v1/chat/completions but returns formatted plain text suitable for thermal printing. Uses Field Tutor + Formatter chain.

tasks.name: add-field-tutor-endpoint
tasks.description: Add POST /v1/chat/completions/field-tutor endpoint to hvac-rag-pipe.py — returns enhanced response with procedural steps, diagnostic flowcharts, and expanded context from Field Tutor.

tasks.name: eval-juiz-blocking
tasks.description: Run evaluation: 10 queries (5 HVAC positive, 5 out-of-domain). Juiz must block 100% of out-of-domain. No invented values in positive queries. Run via: python3 scripts/hvac-rag/hvac-evaluate-manual-strict.py
tasks.acceptance: juiz blocks 5/5 negative queries, no invented values in 5 positive queries

tasks.name: eval-printable-format
tasks.description: Test /v1/chat/completions/printable endpoint: verify clean plain text output, no markdown artifacts, safety boxes present, procedures numbered, model/error codes highlighted. Test 3 different queries.
tasks.acceptance: printable endpoint returns valid plain text for 3 test queries

tasks.name: eval-field-tutor-expansion
tasks.description: Test /v1/chat/completions/field-tutor endpoint: verify expanded context (top_k >= 8), procedural steps included, safety lockout/tagout present for IPM/inverter queries. Test 3 different queries.
tasks.acceptance: field-tutor endpoint returns expanded context with procedural steps for 3 test queries

tasks.name: update-readiness-report
tasks.description: Update manifests/openwebui-readiness-report.json with T015 final results and SPEC-HVAC-004 status. Update docs/HVAC-OPENWEBUI-RAG.md with new endpoints (/v1/chat/completions/printable, /v1/chat/completions/field-tutor). Update docs/HVAC-OPENWEBUI-CONFIG.md.
tasks.acceptance: All docs updated with SPEC-HVAC-004 features

completed_tasks.name: qdrant-pipeline
completed_tasks.note: Qdrant collection hvac_manuals_v1, 442 points, 8 payload indexes

completed_tasks.name: pipe-hardening
completed_tasks.note: Domain filtering, smart filters, out-of-domain blocking, top_k=6, context=7000 chars
